steps.title: Find the axis (pencil)
steps.description: Lightly sketch a single tall vertical line where the center of the lighthouse will stand. This axis keeps the tower from leaning.

steps.title: Block the tower (pencil)
steps.description: Still in pencil, sketch two lines on either side of the axis, slightly closer together at the top than the bottom. The taper is gentle — the tower should still feel sturdy, not pointy.

steps.title: Block the lantern room and cap (pencil)
steps.description: At the top of the tower, sketch a small rectangle for the glass lantern room, then a low triangle or shallow dome above it for the cap. Add a tiny vertical line on top for the spire.

steps.title: Mark the base (pencil)
steps.description: Sketch a slightly wider band at the bottom of the tower for the base, and a short horizontal line where it meets the headland or rocks.

steps.title: Switch to ink and trace the silhouette
steps.description: Switch to ink. Trace the outline of the whole structure — base, tower, lantern room, cap, spire — in one mostly continuous pass. Where shapes meet, land your lines cleanly at the junction.

steps.title: Ink the details (ink)
steps.description: Still in ink, add a small horizontal line beneath the lantern room for the gallery walkway, and one or two short horizontal stripes across the tower to suggest painted bands. Keep it sparse — this lighthouse is far away.
